DIALOG.TITLE: Import campaign base
DIALOG.DESCRIPTION: Upload a CSV or XLSX with name and Brazilian mobile phone. Invalid files import no contacts.

FILE.TITLE: Upload the base
FILE.BODY: Use CSV or XLSX with name and phone columns.

BATCHES.TITLE: Set the batches
BATCHES.BODY: Each contact receives the campaign label and one batch label.

REVIEW.TITLE: Review before importing
REVIEW.BODY: If any row has an error, nothing is imported until the file is fixed.

FIELDS.BATCH_COUNT_HELP: Batches split the base into operating groups. The first batch can be smaller when the split is not exact.
FIELDS.BATCH_COUNT_EXAMPLE: Example: 101 contacts in 10 batches creates the first batch with 2 contacts and the others with 11.
FIELDS.FILE_HELP: Accepted headers: nome, name, cliente, contato, telefone, whatsapp, celular, and número. Only Brazilian mobile phones are valid.

HISTORY.TITLE: Campaign import history
HISTORY.SUBTITLE: Track validations, imports, and campaign label undo actions.
HISTORY.EMPTY: No campaign import has been created yet.

VALIDATE.TITLE: Automatic validation
VALIDATE.BODY: This page refreshes itself while a base is validating or importing.

CONFIRM.TITLE: Import only after confirmation
CONFIRM.BODY: Ready bases do not create contacts until you click Import.

UNDO.TITLE: Label control
UNDO.BODY: Undo removes only this import's labels from affected contacts.

UNDO_DIALOG.TITLE: Undo import labels
UNDO_DIALOG.DESCRIPTION: This removes only labels created by this base from affected contacts. Contacts will not be deleted.

DELETE_DIALOG.TITLE: Delete uploaded base
DELETE_DIALOG.DESCRIPTION: This removes this base record and its files. It is only allowed before contacts are imported.
